title: butyrospermum parkii var. niloticum
intro: Butyrospermum parkii var. niloticum, also known as African shea tree, is a plant species native to Africa, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The bark and kernel of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Butyrospermum parkii var. niloticum include skin moisturizing, wound healing, and protection against sun damage, making it a popular ingredient in cosmetics and skincare products. Herbal preparations of the plant include shea butter, which is extracted from the kernel and used in topical applications for its moisturizing and nourishing properties.
